title: cymbidium sanderae
intro: Cymbidium sanderae, also known as the Sanderae orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cymbidium sanderae include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or infusions, as well as in the form of capsules or tablets to support immune function and overall well-being.
